headline_seed: Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands with huge wind gusts - BBC
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Super Typhoon Bavi made landfall over Rota, N. Mariana Islands Monday with 180 mph winds. BBC News and NPR report the island of ~1,500 faces major damage. A second typhoon hit the region in April.

And that's the mews.
